entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The nation where agriculture is a vital sector for food and nutritional security

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The most important sector for India, providing livelihoods and contributing to GDP

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having access to food that provides all necessary nutrients for a healthy life

entities.name: GDP
entities.description: Gross Domestic Product, the total value of goods produced and services provided in a country during one year

entities.name: GREEN REVOLUTION
entities.description: A period of transformation in agriculture that helped ease poverty

entities.name: POVERTY
entities.description: A state of being extremely poor, which agricultural development helps to ease

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of improving agricultural productivity and livelihoods

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Environmental assets that are currently declining in the agricultural sector

entities.name: LANDHOLDINGS
entities.description: The size of land owned by farmers, which are becoming smaller

entities.name: ERRATIC MONSOONS
entities.description: Unpredictable rainfall patterns posing a challenge to agriculture

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: A global crisis affecting the agricultural sector

entities.name: ENERGY CRISIS
entities.description: A shortage of energy resources affecting agricultural operations

entities.name: BIODIVERSITY LOSS
entities.description: The decline in the variety of life in the agricultural ecosystem

entities.name: EXTENSION MACHINERY
entities.description: The system for delivering agricultural knowledge and technology to farmers, currently described as weak

entities.name: INPUT COSTS
entities.description: The costs associated with agricultural inputs, which are rising

entities.name: STORAGE INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: Facilities for storing agricultural produce, currently inadequate

entities.name: POST-HARVEST LOSSES
entities.description: Loss of agricultural produce after harvest, currently high

entities.name: MARKET ACCESS
entities.description: The ability of farmers to reach markets to sell their produce, currently lacking

entities.name: COMPETITIVENESS
entities.description: The ability of the agricultural sector to compete in markets

entities.name: TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: Technological aspects and innovations used to transform agriculture

entities.name: CONSUMER DEMAND
entities.description: The pressure from consumers for agricultural products

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL MARKETS
entities.description: Global markets that place pressure on agricultural systems
